{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 3.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 2.0, "key_event": "Northern Expedition reunification and Nanjing government; 1927 anti-labor purge", "reasoning": "Mass mobilization surged mid-decade (May Thirtieth, strikes) but the 1927 White Terror decapitated urban organized society, leaving society net slightly lower despite deeper associational roots. The state rose sharply from warlord fragmentation as the Northern Expedition and Nanjing regime built a real, though still limited and contested, central military-administrative apparatus."}
